name: Cocktail Cheese Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Neufchatel cheese and yogurt in a large mixing bowl; beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add cheddar cheese and the next 4 ingredients; stir well.
3. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour.
4. Shape the cheese mixture into a ball, and sprinkle with parsley.
5. Press parsley gently into the cheese ball.
6. Wrap the cheese ball in heavy-duty plastic wrap and chill.
7. Serve with assorted unsalted crackers.
NOTE: Prepare this crowd-pleasing appetizer up to a week ahead if necessary. If you make the cheese ball more than a day ahead, wait until party time to add parsley. Yield: 2 cups (about 39 calories per tablespoon).
